guardrail_spec.description: Fixtures for the Schema Intake Guardrail. Each submission has an expected verdict. A correct validator ACCEPTS every entry in valid_submissions and REJECTS every entry in invalid_submissions, matching the expected_reason code.

structural_rules.deprecated_requires: replaced_by must reference an existing, non-deprecated tool id
structural_rules.unique_id: id must not collide with an already-registered tool

valid_submissions.name: get_tax_summary
valid_submissions.description: Retrieve the aggregated tax liability summary for a fiscal period broken down by jurisdiction.

valid_submissions.name: get_deploy_history
valid_submissions.description: Return the recent deployment history for a service including version, actor and timestamp.

invalid_submissions.note: Under 6 words and semantically empty — router cannot categorize it safely.

submission.name: send email
submission.description: Send an email message to a recipient with subject and body content.

invalid_submissions.note: id and name contain a space; must be snake_case, cluster-prefixed.

submission.description: Retrieve a thing from the HR system for a given employee identifier value.

submission.name: get_user
submission.description: Duplicate of an already-registered canonical user lookup tool endpoint.

invalid_submissions.note: id user.get_user already exists in the live catalog.

submission.name: big_query_thing
submission.description: Run a query against the warehouse and return rows to the caller for analysis and reporting.

invalid_submissions.note: 'text' is not an allowed parameter type (use 'string').

submission.name: mega_tool
submission.description: A single catch-all operations tool that can do almost anything across the entire platform in one call.

invalid_submissions.note: 13 parameters exceeds the max of 12; also a design smell (god-tool).

submission.name: create_invoice_v3
submission.description: Next generation invoice creation tool superseding the previous invoice creation tools entirely.

submission.name: archive_contract
submission.description: Archive a contract record so it no longer appears in the active contracts list view.

invalid_submissions.note: replaced_by points to a tool id that does not exist in the catalog.

invalid_submissions.submission: { id: 'crm.oops', name: 'oops', description: 'trailing comma and unquoted keys', }
invalid_submissions.note: Submission is not valid JSON (unquoted keys, trailing comma, single quotes).
